performance.notes: No dynamic data fetching — static Next.js Server Component. Load performance not applicable.

owasp_checks.name: Broken Access Control
owasp_checks.notes: All external links have rel=noopener noreferrer

owasp_checks.name: Cryptographic Failures
owasp_checks.notes: No sensitive data in DOM or data-* attributes

owasp_checks.name: Injection (XSS)
owasp_checks.notes: No innerHTML, no inline event handlers, React JSX renders as text nodes

owasp_checks.name: Insecure Design
owasp_checks.notes: Static content only, no user input paths

owasp_checks.name: Vulnerable Components
owasp_checks.notes: Next.js 16.2.6, React 19.2.4 — no known CVEs at test date

owasp_checks.name: Software & Data Integrity Failures
owasp_checks.notes: No deserialization or external data consumed by this component

owasp_checks.name: Server-Side Request Forgery
owasp_checks.notes: No HTTP requests made by this component

test_cases.description: Full page renders without errors — HTTP 200, title present
test_cases.notes: Page title: 'Oscar Menéndez García'

test_cases.description: section#writing element present in DOM
test_cases.notes: Confirmed via Playwright accessibility snapshot and DOM query

test_cases.description: Section has aria-labelledby='writing-heading'
test_cases.notes: aria-labelledby attribute value matches heading id

test_cases.description: Heading is h2 with id='writing-heading'
test_cases.notes: tagName=H2, id=writing-heading verified

test_cases.description: Three <article> elements rendered inside section
test_cases.notes: articles.length=3

test_cases.description: <time> elements with ISO 8601 dateTime attributes
test_cases.notes: dateTime values: [2026-03-15, 2026-03-01, 2026-02-10] — all match YYYY-MM-DD

test_cases.description: Platform labels LinkedIn, X, Blog all present
test_cases.notes: Platform enum values render correctly per TypeScript type

test_cases.description: Articles sorted by date descending (newest first)
Read more links have target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer'
test_cases.notes: All 3 links verified. hrefs are placeholder '#' — see BUG-001 (Low)

test_cases.description: Last article: borderBottomWidth=0px, paddingBottom=0px
test_cases.notes: last:border-0 and last:pb-0 Tailwind variants working correctly

test_cases.description: All 7 design tokens resolve to correct color values
test_cases.notes: bg=#0a0a0a, surface-elevated=#242424, text-primary=#f5f5f5, text-secondary=#999, border=#333, accent=#d4af37, accent-hover=#e6c547

test_cases.description: Heading renders in text-text-primary color
test_cases.notes: Computed color: rgb(245,245,245) = #f5f5f5. fontWeight=600

test_cases.description: Read more link renders in accent color
test_cases.notes: Computed color: rgb(212,175,55) = #d4af37

test_cases.description: Platform label uses monospace font (JetBrains Mono)
test_cases.notes: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'JetBrains Mono Fallback'

test_cases.description: Hover state applies bg-surface-elevated background and border-radius
test_cases.notes: backgroundColor=rgb(36,36,36) (#242424), borderRadius=8px on hover. Screenshot: TC-003-hover-state.png

test_cases.description: Hover transition is smooth (~150ms cubic-bezier)
test_cases.notes: transition: color,background-color,... 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)

test_cases.description: Separator dot uses text-border color (#333)
test_cases.notes: Computed color: rgb(51,51,51) = #333333 — matches --color-border token

test_cases.description: Separator dots are aria-hidden='true'
test_cases.notes: 3 separator spans with aria-hidden=true — excluded from screen reader tree

test_cases.description: Focus ring: 2px solid accent, 2px offset on Read more links
test_cases.notes: outlineStyle=solid, outlineWidth=2px, outlineColor=rgb(212,175,55), outlineOffset=2px. Screenshot: TC-006-focus-ring.png

test_cases.description: All links have natural tab order — no tabindex overrides
test_cases.notes: tabindex=null on all 3 links — natural document order preserved

test_cases.description: Section has scroll-margin-top=80px for fixed navbar offset
test_cases.notes: scrollMarginTop=80px via globals.css rule section[id]

test_cases.description: No horizontal overflow at 320px viewport width
test_cases.notes: scrollWidth=305 <= viewportWidth=320. Screenshot: TC-005-mobile-320px.png

test_cases.description: Heading is 24px (text-2xl) on 375px mobile viewport
test_cases.notes: fontSize=24px on 375px. Heading scales to 36px (text-4xl) on 1280px. Screenshot: TC-004-mobile-375px.png

test_cases.description: No XSS vectors — article titles render as plain text nodes
test_cases.notes: OWASP A03. No < or > in rendered text. React JSX escapes all content.

test_cases.description: External links have rel=noopener noreferrer
test_cases.notes: OWASP A01. Prevents window.opener access from third-party pages.

test_cases.description: No inline event handlers (onclick, onmouseover, etc.)
test_cases.notes: OWASP A03. 0 elements with on* attributes found in section.

test_cases.description: No sensitive data exposed in data-* attributes
test_cases.notes: OWASP A02. 0 data-* attributes in section.

screenshots.description: Hover state on first article item
Focus ring on Read more link
